guide.title: Status Management Guide
guide.subtitle: Click on a status to see details and transitions
guide.tip: In Kanban view, drag cards to change status. Invalid transitions are automatically rejected.

status.intakeDesc: Client is answering intake questions. The system auto-moves to Pending once all questions are answered. Staff can also manually close intake and move to Pending.
status.pendingDesc: Request is submitted and waiting for a staff member to pick it up. Staff can self-assign and start processing.
status.missingInfoDesc: Staff needs additional information from the client. The request is paused until the client provides what is needed.
status.inProgressDesc: A staff member is actively working on this request. Can be moved to Done, MissingInfo, or back to Pending.
status.doneDesc: Request has been completed. Can be re-opened and moved back to InProgress if needed.

chat.adminObserverStatus: You are viewing as Admin. Only the assigned Staff member can send messages.

intakeForm.title: Intake Questions
intakeForm.subtitle: Answer in any order — edit anytime
intakeForm.historyNote: History saved on server · Visible to both Client and Staff
intakeForm.completionHint: Please answer all required questions to continue
intakeForm.allDoneDesc: Our team will review and respond as soon as possible.

requestActions.confirmDoneDesc: This request will be marked as completed. You can still reopen it later.
requestActions.confirmCancelDesc: This request will be cancelled. This action cannot be undone.

profile.deleteAvatarDesc: Your profile picture will be replaced with a default avatar.
profile.deleteClientDesc: All organization data will be permanently deleted. All members will lose access. This action cannot be undone.
profile.leaveClientDesc: You will no longer see this organization's requests. You can be re-invited later.
profile.clientActionError: An error occurred. Please try again.

users.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this user?

intake.title: Intake Questions
intake.subtitle: Manage automated question sets for the intake process
intake.emptyDesc: Create your first question set to start the automated intake process
intake.noPermissionDesc: Only admins can manage intake questions
intake.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this question set?
intake.nameRequired: Question set name and at least 1 question are required

sla.title: SLA Configuration
sla.subtitle: Configure automatic deadline hours per priority level
sla.howItWorksDesc: When a Client creates a new request, the system automatically sets a deadline based on the selected priority level. You can customize the deadline hours for each level below.
sla.descPlaceholder: E.g. Urgent tickets require immediate attention

landing.headline:
Turn ideas into <gradient>reality</gradient>
in just a few steps
landing.subtitle: NeedApp helps you submit requests, communicate directly with our expert team, and track project progress — all in one platform.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Simple workflow, clear communication, track anytime.
landing.feature1Desc: Just describe your need briefly — the system automatically asks for more details to fully understand your requirements.
landing.feature2Desc: Communicate with our team through a modern chat interface. Send files, images and get fast responses.
landing.feature3Desc: Know the exact status of your request — from intake, in progress to completion. Never miss an update.
landing.feature4Desc: The automated intake process helps the team grasp your needs instantly, shortening response time.
landing.feature5Desc: Data is encrypted and protected. Only you and authorized team members can access your information.
landing.feature6Desc: Submit requests at any time. Our team will respond as soon as possible.
landing.howSubtitle: Just 3 simple steps to start your project
landing.step1Desc: Create a free account, briefly describe your project needs. The system will automatically ask for more details.
landing.step2Desc: Chat directly, share reference documents. The team will analyze and provide the best solution.
landing.step3Desc: Track progress in real-time, receive automatic updates. Project completed on time, as required.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Sign up for free today and experience the most professional request management platform.

mockChat.msg1: What industry is your website for?
mockChat.msg2: I need an online fashion e-commerce website
mockChat.msg3: How many pages would you like the website to have?
mockChat.msg4: Around 5-10 pages, including home, products, and shopping cart
mockChat.msg5: Hi! I've received your request. I'll send a quote within 24h 👋

members.removeConfirmBefore: Are you sure you want to remove
members.removeWarning: The user will no longer see your company's requests.
members.errorNoAccount: This email doesn't have a NeedApp account. Ask them to register first, then invite again.
members.errorOtherClient: This user is already a member of another company in NeedApp.
members.errorAlreadyMember: This user is already a member of your company.

footer.tagline: Smart customer request management system — helping you communicate and track projects easily.

emailSettings.title: Email Settings
emailSettings.subtitle: Customize which email notifications you receive
emailSettings.eventNotificationsDesc: Choose which events trigger an email notification
emailSettings.onAssignmentDesc: Get notified when a request is assigned to you
emailSettings.onStatusChangeDesc: Get notified when a request status changes
emailSettings.onOverdueDesc: Get notified when a request passes its deadline
emailSettings.onNewRequestDesc: Get notified when a new request is created
emailSettings.digestDesc: Receive a summary of all active requests you're involved with
emailSettings.note: Organization invitation emails are always sent and cannot be disabled. Changes are saved automatically.
